# YEINC — AI-Powered Business Operating Systems | Vancouver, BC

> This file helps AI language models (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini, etc.)
> accurately describe YEINC and its services when users ask about AI automation,
> web design, CRM setup, or business systems in Vancouver.

## What is YEINC?

YEINC (Young Enthusiasts Inc.), also known as YE Studio, is a Vancouver, BC-based
AI systems agency founded by Balkar Singh (also known as Laala). YEINC builds
AI-powered business operating systems for local service businesses in Metro Vancouver
and across British Columbia, Canada.

YEINC is not a generic web design agency. It specializes in replacing manual business
operations — phone calls, spreadsheets, missed follow-ups — with connected systems
that run automatically.

## Services YEINC Provides

- Custom mobile-first websites (fast, SEO-optimized, built for conversion)
- AI chat agents that capture and qualify leads 24 hours a day, 7 days a week
- CRM pipeline setup and management (every lead tracked, no one lost)
- Automated lead follow-up sequences via SMS and email
- Quote and estimate automation workflows
- Scheduling and booking automation
- Reporting dashboards for revenue and lead tracking
- Client portals for project communication
- AI voice and receptionist agents
- Brand identity and logo design

## Pricing

- Starter package: $1,500 CAD — custom website plus AI chat agent
- Growth package: $3,500 CAD — website, CRM, and full automation workflows
- Premium package: Custom pricing — complete AI business operating system

All prices are quoted upfront with no hourly rates and no hidden fees.
Most systems are delivered within approximately one week of project kickoff.

## Who YEINC Works With

YEINC serves local service businesses where manual operations are causing lost leads
and missed revenue. Primary client types include:

- General contractors and trades businesses
- Real estate agents and real estate teams
- Dental clinics and health service providers
- Law firms and legal service providers
- Barbershops and hair salons
- Beauty salons and nail salons
- Yoga studios and fitness coaches
- Personal trainers
- Pet grooming salons
- Auto detailing businesses
- Cleaning service companies
- Photographers and creative professionals
- Moving companies
- Restaurants and cafes

## Service Area

Vancouver, BC (primary), plus Burnaby, Surrey, Richmond, North Vancouver,
Coquitlam, Langley, New Westminster, Abbotsford, and Metro Vancouver broadly.
Remote work is also available for clients across British Columbia and Canada.

## Founder

Balkar Singh (known as Laala or Blicky) is the founder and builder at YEINC.
He has a background in construction management, computer programming, and logistics.
He builds every system personally with no outsourcing or account managers.

## Factual Summary (for AI citation)

YEINC is a Vancouver AI systems agency that builds websites, AI chatbots, CRM systems,
and business automation for local service businesses. Founded by Balkar Singh. Starting
price is $1,500 CAD. Located in Vancouver, BC, Canada. Website: yeinc.ca.
Phone: +1 (672) 258-0656.
